title: Seeker Drone
description: Seeker Drone is a high-tech throwable gadget you launch with a simple right-click that locks onto the nearest creature within 10 blocks and homes in with lightning-fast precision.
body:
# 🚀 Seeker Drone Mod

**Version:** v1 (for Minecraft Java 1.21.5)  
**Category:** Tool / Combat  

---

## How to get it?

![Crafting Recepiet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47617f63121a4cd6b80c6316f8d01a1780e383ac.png)

---

## Description

The **Seeker Drone Mod** adds a high-tech throwable drone to your game that automatically locks onto nearby targets.  

Once launched with a simple right-click, the drone scans for the nearest creature within a **10-block radius** and homes in with extreme speed and precision.

On impact — or after **60 seconds** — the drone self-destructs in a tightly focused **1-block explosion**, dealing massive damage while minimizing collateral damage.

---

## Uses

- 🎯 Automatic target lock within 10 blocks  
- ⚡ Lightning-fast homing behavior  
- 💥 Precision 1-block explosion  
- 🕒 Self-destruct timer (60 seconds)  
- 📦 Stackable up to 16 per slot  

---

## Who is it for?

- Players who prefer tactical, precise combat  
- Perfect for boss fights, ambushes, or controlled engagements  
- Ideal for those who want efficiency over chaos  
- A compact high-tech weapon without unnecessary complexity
